Sentral — The Experience

Where great spaces
meet exceptional people.

Sentral communities are designed around a simple belief: that where you live should feel like the best version of your life. Our team, our programming, our spaces, and our technology make that possible — every day.

Events & Programming Our Team Exceptional Spaces Sentral Life App
The Sentral Difference

Living here feels different.
Because it is.

Most apartment buildings offer amenities. Sentral offers a life. Our model is built on hospitality — with a Director of Lifestyle, a Director of Experience, and a team trained to know your name, your preferences, and your schedule. Every interaction is intentional. Every space is activated. Every day has something worth looking forward to.

From curated wine tastings to wellness coaching, film screenings to live music — Sentral programming brings the energy of the world's best boutique hotels into the rhythm of everyday residential life.

Director of Lifestyle — Miro, San Jose, CA
Events & Programming

The pulse of
every community.

Led by a dedicated Director of Lifestyle at each community, Sentral’s programming is ever-evolving — celebrating local artists, culinary talent, wellness experts, and musicians. No two months look the same. That’s the point.

01 — Culinary Programming

Twilight tastings, chef’s table dinners & local partnerships.

From intimate wine pairings to Chef’s Table Series dinners, Sentral’s food and beverage programming celebrates local culinary talent. Resident-exclusive tastings, curated cocktail events, and brunch activations bring the energy of the city’s best restaurants right to your building. Everything served on a tray. Always in proper glassware.

02 — Wellness & Fitness

The Sporting Club at The Bellevue. Fitness unlike anything else in a residence.

The Sporting Club at The Bellevue in Philadelphia sets the standard — turf training floor, competition-grade equipment, and a two-level facility that rivals any private gym in the city. Sentral communities feature a dedicated Wellness Director leading 15 weekly group classes, personal coaching sessions, and programming that evolves with residents. Everything reservable through the Sentral Life App.

03 — Arts & Music

Resident DJs, rotating art exhibitions & live sessions.

Our Music Director holds a residency at each community — performing four weekly live sets and offering private lessons. Rotating artist exhibitions give emerging creatives a platform. Vinyl nights, film screenings, and live sessions bring the cultural life of the city indoors, for the people who live there.

04 — Social Events

Resident-only events, rooftop socials & community moments.

From “But First, Brunch” mornings to members-only film nights, Sentral’s social calendar is designed to build real community. RSVP through the Sentral Life App, invite a guest, and show up. Our Lifestyle Director handles every detail — so you don’t have to think about it. Just enjoy it.

Hospitality-trained. Resident-focused.

Our team changes
how it feels to come home.

Every Sentral community is led by a Director of Experience — a role modeled after the Front Office Director of a five-star hotel. This is not a leasing office. This is a hospitality operation. Our team members know your name before you reach the desk, remember your preferences, and anticipate what you need before you ask.

We hire from luxury hotels, not apartment companies. The result is a level of service that most residential buildings simply can’t replicate — because they’ve never tried to be this.

Leads 24/7 front desk operations with the standard of a five-star hotel Front Office Director. Oversees all guest and resident services, package delivery, valet, and the quality of every resident interaction from move-in to renewal.

Owns the cultural identity of the community. Leads all programming, partnerships with local artists and vendors, event activations, and the Member Club experience. Constantly networked in the local scene to bring the best of the city into the building.

A certified health and well-being expert — not a personal trainer. Leads 15 weekly group classes, personal coaching sessions, and integrated wellness programming. Available for one-on-one sessions, nutritional guidance, and customized plans.

On-site 24 hours a day, 365 days a year. Manages front desk operations, package concierge delivery to your door, guest services, and real-time communication through the Sentral Life App. Standing, at attention, and genuinely glad to see you.

Exceptional spaces

Designed to be
lived in.

Every Sentral community is selected for its architecture, location, and potential. These are buildings that belong to their cities — and spaces worth spending time in.

SentralLife App — Available on the App Store

Your entire home
in your pocket.

🏆 2024 MFE Award — Best Use of Proptech

Sentral launched SentralLife in 2023 — winner of the 2024 MFE Award for Best Use of Proptech — and it now has a 90% adoption rate among residents. Available on the App Store, it's the operating system for living at Sentral: one place to run your home, access your building, and stay connected to everything happening around you.

At Your Service — 24/7 Messaging
Reach an Experience Ambassador any time, day or night. Real-time text communication with your on-site team — for service requests, guest access, deliveries, or anything else.
Programming & Event RSVP
View the full community events calendar, reserve spots in fitness classes, and RSVP for resident activations — all in one place.
Smart Access & Home Controls
Unlock your front door, manage guest access, and control smart home features — including one-time entry codes for visitors and deliveries.
Package Tracking & Concierge Delivery
Track all your packages in real time. Request front-door delivery to your home — handled by your on-site team, not a locker system.
Amenity Reservations & F&B Ordering
Book private dining rooms, co-working spaces, and fitness studios. Order from on-site food and beverage services. Reserve your spot at the next tasting.
Exclusive Resident Benefits & Travel
Access resident-only offers from local partners, SentralPlus travel benefits, and exclusive deals available only through the app.
Download on the
App Store
90% adoption rate
